findings.description: Devcontainer devcontainer.json containerEnv sets DATABASE_URL=sqlite:////app/db.sqlite3 but .devcontainer/Dockerfile is based on mcr.microsoft.com/devcontainers/python (not root Dockerfile) and does not create /app/ or app user; vscode user cannot write to /app/

decision: FIXED — changed devcontainer.json DATABASE_URL from sqlite:////app/db.sqlite3 to sqlite:////home/vscode/db.sqlite3 (vscode home directory, always writable); updated devcontainer.md docs and README.md table to reflect the corrected path
